# Infrastructure inventory

`python scripts/sync_repo_docs.py`

Then commit this file. Pre-commit runs `sync_repo_docs.py --check`.

| Script | Target |
|--------|--------|
| `iso-chat-webhook` | `iso_agent.scripts.iso_chat_webhook:main` |

| `iso-notion-mcp-login` | `iso_agent.scripts.notion_mcp_login:main` |
